channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Why Didn’t Iran Use Terrorism
item.description: Why didn’t Iran turn to terrorism in a war that threatened its survival? Explanations may include disrupted networks, fears of retaliation, and strategic restraint—some factors suggest this is not a break from Iran's terrorism past, but a pause.

item.title: Australia and Indonesia: A Strategic Partnership for Climate and Energy Resilience
item.description: On the frontlines of climate change, Indonesia faces rising sea levels, surging energy demands, and intensifying geopolitical pressure, creating a pivotal moment for Australia to step in and help shape the country's future.

item.title: How Russia Is Building a Sovereign Drone Ecosystem for AI-Driven Autonomy
item.description: Kateryna Bondar analyzes how Russia is leveraging applied AI and building drone ecosystem, combining decentralized innovation, commercial tech, and state coordination to accelerate battlefield autonomy.

item.title: Suspected Uranium Enrichment Building at Yongbyon Complete
item.description: Recent imagery shows the completion of a building at Yongbyon, widely believed to be a new uranium enrichment plant.
